home.headline: Find the Odd One Out.
home.subtitle: Blitz through 60 seconds of themed trivia. Climb the streaks, trigger power cards, and keep the clock alive.

powerCards.title: Power Cards
powerCards.subtitle: Each match comes with four single-use boosts.
powerCards.doubleScore: Bank double points on a confident call.
powerCards.timeKeep: Protect the clock from a misfire.

game.footerNote: Wrong calls cost 3 seconds. Stay sharp.

results.title: Results
results.summary: You cleared {count} questions in one minute.
results.signInPrompt: Sign in with Google to save your runs and compete on leaderboards.
results.noSessionHint: Start a new run to see your results summary.

highScores.title: High Scores
